---
title: "Publications"
---

<iframe width="800" height="1030" src="resources/An Innovative Design of a Permanent Magnet-Assisted Synchronous Reluctance Motor to Improve Torque Performance for High Speed Applications.pdf">

</iframe>

<iframe width="800" height="1125" src="resources/Novel Design of Permanent Magnet-Assisted Synchronous Reluctance Motor Using Metal Additive Manufacturing Technology.pdf">

</iframe>
